name: Vegetarian Chili Texas Style
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (15 oz) cooked kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve granular hamburger crumbles in boiling water for at least 10 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add onions and green peppers, sauté until softened.
4. Stir in crushed garlic and cook for an additional minute.
5. Mix the sautéed vegetables with dissolved burger crumbles.
6. Combine remaining ingredients (tomatoes, tomato paste, water, seasonings) in a large pot.
7. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
8. Cook at least 1 hour, stirring occasionally for best flavor.
